personal.name: Jack Cutrara
personal.title: Software Engineer
personal.summary: Software engineer who builds real systems, not tutorials. Every project in this portfolio exists because Jack saw a problem and decided to solve it. Passionate about clean architecture, strong fundamentals, and shipping code that works.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science

projects.name: SeatWatch
projects.description: A multi-service SaaS platform that monitors restaurant availability and books reservations automatically, with a dual-strategy booking engine, distributed locking, and browser identity fingerprinting across a Turborepo monorepo.

projects.name: NFL Prediction System
projects.description: A full-stack prediction engine generating win probability, spread, and over/under predictions with walk-forward temporal validation, market blending, and an interactive FastAPI dashboard.

projects.name: SolSniper
projects.description: A high-speed Solana trading system with multi-source token detection, three-tier safety validation, six-step sell escalation, crash recovery, and a real-time Preact monitoring dashboard.

projects.name: Optimize AI
projects.description: A personal fitness platform for tracking workouts, nutrition, habits, and body composition built with Next.js 15 and Supabase, enforcing complete user data isolation through PostgreSQL Row-Level Security on every table.

projects.name: Clipify
projects.description: An AI-powered SaaS that transforms YouTube videos, streams, and uploaded footage into captioned short-form clips using Whisper transcription, GPT-powered moment detection, and FFmpeg rendering.

projects.name: Crypto Breakout Trader
projects.description: An automated cryptocurrency day-trading system implementing momentum breakout detection on 5-minute candles with composable signal filters, risk-based position sizing, and atomic state persistence.

experience: Jack is a recent CS graduate actively seeking a software engineering role. He learns by building — every project in this portfolio was designed, architected, and coded by Jack to solve a real problem. His projects span full-stack web apps, trading systems, ML pipelines, and AI-powered SaaS products. He is currently looking for a software engineering role where he can contribute to a team building something that matters.
